# Tahoe Planning*Created: Tuesday, January 17, 2023 at 1:11:01?PM*<div><h1>Tahoe Planning</h1><b><h1><br></h1></b></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>To do in am <br></div>
<ul>
<li> CVS <br></li>
<li>Car seat fixing <br></li>
<li>Watch snow driving videos<br></li>
<li>Download iPad games for Ella </li>
<li>Plan edu </li>
<li>Print  Worksheets</li>
<li>Timer on AC </li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div>To do on drive<b><br></b></div>
<ul>
<li><b>Call to find out if private lesson three hour too much for a first time four year old </b></li>
<li>Buy movie tickets </li>
<li>Pre-plan village activities? Rec center?<br></li>
<li>Email Sarah Re camp and room parent</li>
<li>Email Ella Re note<br></li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div>Buy there</div>
<ul>
<li>Cold brew<br></li>
<li>Banana<br></li>
<li>Laundry detergent<br></li>
<li>Teethers <br></li>
<li>Face sunscreen <br></li>
<li>Foot warming pads<br></li>
<li>Gripe water <br></li>
<li>Cereal</li>
<li>Diapers<br></li>
<li>Soda<br></li>
<li>Logs</li>
<li>Yogurt </li>
<li>Berries</li>
<li>Milk </li>
<li>Eggs</li>
<li>Berries</li>
<li>Card</li>
<li>IPA <br></li>
<li>Mary book gift </li>
<li>Snowman mouth candies </li>
<li>Hair ties</li>
<li>Shampoo </li>
<li>Floss and toothbrushes </li>
<li>Pacified </li>
<li>Kids Fanny pack </li>
<li>Wipes</li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Proposed Agenda:<br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Tue <br></div>
<ul>
<li>Arrive get settled go grocery shopping baby proof everything<br></li>
<li>Word prep <br></li>
</ul>
<div>Wed<br></div>
<ul>
<li>Morning learning<br></li>
<li>Get gear w Ella and ride a little together or just us two<br></li>
<li>Groceries</li>
<li>Sledding<br></li>
<li>Go out to dinner, rec center?<br></li>
</ul>
<div>Thurs </div>
<ul>
<li>Morning learning </li>
<li>Ella private lesson am? The lunch together then sledding, drop her off and ski snowboard together <br></li>
</ul>
<div>Fri<br></div>
<ul>
<li>Morning learning </li>
<li>we all ski together in am OR We both get private lessons then go to Mary <br></li>
</ul>
<div>Sat - Ella day <br></div>
<ul>
<li>Morning learning </li>
<li>Ella and us go sledding/skii in am </li>
<li>Movies w Ella - afternoon </li>
<li>Sledding </li>
<li>Hot tub at night<br></li>
</ul>
<div>Sunday - family day <br></div>
<ul>
<li>Morning learning </li>
<li>Ice skating<br></li>
<li>Lunch w kave at ritz?<br></li>
<li>Visit Lake Tahoe? Too far?<br></li>
<li>Massages &amp dinner<br></li>
</ul>
<div>Monday</div>
<ul>
<li>Ella ski group lesson am , we take turns watching and skiing?<br></li>
<li>Pack in afternoon then go out <br></li>
<li>Afternoon learning <br></li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>When there</div>
<ul>
<li>Help Ella choose what to wear before leaving w kave</li>
<li>Baby proof everything<br></li>
<li>Walk kave through poison control, 911, cpr, first aid <br></li>
<li>Decide on how kave can discipline Ella <br></li>
<li>Write it in a text to her<br></li>
<li>When putting down read a story or three and turn on music and say goodnight. If cry go in to calm down. <br></li>
<li>Better to call if unsure about something than not</li>
<li>Snow safety if going out to walk <br></li>
</ul>
<div><br></div>
<ul>
<li>Tahoe Baby</li>
<ul>
<li>Please contact Tahoe Getaways to get access code to get key and deliver items prior to our arrival on 1/24. Please deliver in the morning. Their number is 530-583-0220</li>
<li>Need to confirm toys are for age appropriate, can get into house, and where to put crib </li>
</ul>
<li>Mazda check <br></li>
<ul>
<li>Awd <br></li>
<li>M+S tires - 730 seconds of an inch - <br></li>
<li>DonŐt recommend to use chains bc will scratch aluminum wheels but wonŐt void lease <br></li>
<li>Check tires 8-5 m-f <br></li>
<li>Saun - <br></li>
<li>Why no chains and are we breaking lease if we use them? <br></li>
<li>https://www.mazdausa.com/static/manuals/2020/cx-30/contents/05220102.html<br></li>
</ul>
<li>Sportsbasement</li>
<ul>
<li>Please match the jacket and pants to the Junior &amp Womens jacket and pants if possible.<br></li>
<li>1177 Kern Ave</li>
<li>Sunnyvale, CA 94085</li>
<li>(408) 598-4240<br></li>
<li>Need EllaŐs sizes for: <br></li>
<li>Bib 4t<br></li>
<li>Jake xs <br></li>
<li>Gloves toddler s<br></li>
<li>Googled </li>
<li>Boots 9<br></li>
<li>Ski 88<br></li>
<li><b>Boots</b><b> 15</b><br></li>
<li>Notes/ make outfits match and sorel booths <br></li>
<li>Marina large jacket medium bibs 9 boots boots 24.5<br></li>
<li>And get <b>one e</b><b>xtra </b><b>lon</b>g Johns per person <br></li>
<li>$190 for carrier boots on corners skis in middle board In top and crossbars for $100<br></li>
<li>If have the flush roof - $200 of flat $760 <br></li>
<li>Baird 139- better or 145 <br></li>
<li>DonŐt put all in middle so doesnŐt sway side to side and come off when driving <br></li>
<li>Ernie and Ronnie</li>
<li>Ella 16.5 or 17<br></li>
</ul>
</ul>
